---
title: "NK cells"
author: "Neal Liu"
date: "2024-12-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load libraries & our own helper functions
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(edgeR)
library(viridis)
devtools::source_url('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Neal-Liu1/Multi-omics-integration/main/Helper_functions.R')
source('testPackage/R/Sc_helper_functions.R')

```

```{r}
nk_data <- qs::qread('/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/Seurat_3Assays_Genes24K_Cells140K_SingletHTO_CorrectDonors (1).qs')

```


```{r}
nk_data$log2_rna_libsize <- log2(colSums(nk_data@assays$RNA@counts))
nk_data$log2_adt_libsize <- log2(colSums(nk_data@assays$ADT@counts))

rna_metrics <- BenchmarkMetrics(
  Algorithm = c('Raw_counts', 'Seurat_LogNormalize', 'SCTransform','Seurat_rPCA',
                'Harmony_LogNormalize','fastMNN', 'totalVI', 
                'fastRUVIII_supervised', 'fastRUVIII_unsupervised'), 
  Raw_data = nk_data@assays$RNA@counts, 
  Metadata = nk_data@meta.data)

#rownames(rna_metrics@Raw_data) <- dimnames(nk_data@assays$RNA)[[1]]
#colnames(rna_metrics@Raw_data) <- dimnames(nk_data@assays$RNA)[[2]]

adt_metrics <- BenchmarkMetrics(
  Algorithm = c('Raw_counts', 'ADTnorm', 'CLR', 'DSB', 'Harmony_CLR', 
                'totalVI', 'fastRUVIII_supervised', 'fastRUVIII_unsupervised'),
  Raw_data = nk_data@assays$ADT@counts[
    edgeR::filterByExpr(nk_data@assays$ADT@counts, 
                        min.count = 2, min.total.count = 50),
    ], 
  Metadata = nk_data@meta.data)


```


```{r}
rna_metrics <- FilterLowlyExpressedGenes(rna_metrics, 'capture', 12000, n_not_detected_batch_to_permit = 0)

# totalVI python conversion shenanigans
test <- SingleCellExperiment::SingleCellExperiment(assays = list(ADT = adt_metrics@Raw_data),
                             colData = nk_data@meta.data)
test2 <- SingleCellExperiment::SingleCellExperiment(assays = list(RNA = rna_metrics@Raw_data),
                             colData = nk_data@meta.data)
# Write H5
zellkonverter::writeH5AD(test, file = '/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/ADT_nk.h5ad')
zellkonverter::writeH5AD(test2, file = '/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/RNA_nk.h5ad')
rm(test)
rm(test2)

# Run all other methods for RNA and ADT
rna_metrics <- NormalizeRNA(
  rna_metrics, batch_variable = 'capture', num_pcs = 30)

adt_metrics <- NormalizeADT(
  adt_metrics, batch_variable = 'capture', num_pcs = 13)

```


```{r}
# totalVI_adt <- zellkonverter::readH5AD('/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/totalVI_adt_nk.h5ad')
# totalVI_rna <- zellkonverter::readH5AD('/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/totalVI_rna_nk.h5ad')
# rna_metrics <- add_totalVI(rna_metrics, totalVI_rna, assay_name = 'rna_normalized', pcs = 30)
# adt_metrics <- add_totalVI(adt_metrics, totalVI_adt, assay_name = 'adt_normalized', pcs = 13)

 # rna_totalVI_counts <- rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI
 # rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI <- log2_sparse(rna_totalVI_counts)
 # 
 # rna_metrics@PCs$totalVI <- run_PCA(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI, 30)$u
 # 
 # adt_totalVI_counts <- adt_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI
 # adt_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI <- log2_sparse(adt_totalVI_counts)
 # 
 # adt_metrics@PCs$totalVI <- run_PCA(adt_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI, 13)$u

```

```{r}
ncgs <- FindNCG(
  rna_metrics, 
  unwanted_variables = c('capture', 'log2_rna_libsize'), 
  bio_variables = c('Day_Treatment', "genetic_donor"), 
  no.ncg = 500, 
  sample_fraction = 0.2)

prpc_supervised <- CreatePRPC(
  rna_metrics@Raw_data, 
  bio_vars = c('Day_Treatment', "genetic_donor"), 
  metadata = rna_metrics@Metadata,
  c('capture', 'log2_rna_libsize'), 
  separate_bins_by_biology = c(NA, T),
  group_by_vars = c(NA,'capture'))

rna_metrics <- RunRUVIII(
  rna_metrics, 
  prpc_supervised, 
  rownames(rna_metrics@Raw_data) %in% ncgs, 
  k=1, 
  name = 'fastRUVIII_supervised')

prpc_adt_supervised <- CreatePRPC(
  adt_metrics@Raw_data, 
  bio_vars = c('Day_Treatment', "genetic_donor"), 
  metadata = rna_metrics@Metadata, 
  uv_vars = c('capture', 'log2_adt_libsize'), 
  separate_bins_by_biology = c(NA, T),
  group_by_vars = c(NA,'capture'))

adt_metrics <- RunRUVIII(
  adt_metrics, 
  prpc_adt_supervised, 
  rep(T,nrow(adt_metrics@Raw_data)), 
  k=2, 
  name = 'fastRUVIII_supervised',
  pcs = 13)


```

# Plot metrics
```{r, fig.height= 6, fig.width= 10}
p1 <- PlotMultipleCorrelations(rna_metrics, c('capture','log2_rna_libsize', 'Day_Treatment', "genetic_donor"), titles = c('Batch', 'Libsize', 'Day_Treatment', "Donor"))
p2 <- PlotMultipleCorrelations(adt_metrics, c('capture','log2_adt_libsize', 'Day_Treatment',"genetic_donor"), titles = c('Batch', 'Libsize', 'Day_Treatment', "Donor"))
gridExtra::grid.arrange(p1,p2, nrow = 2)
```

# Plot UMAPs
```{r}
rna_metrics <- ComputeUMAP(rna_metrics, method = 'uwot')
adt_metrics <- ComputeUMAP(adt_metrics, method = 'uwot')

```

```{r}
plot_UMAP(
  rna_metrics@UMAPs$fastRUVIII_supervised, 
  rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, run_umap = F, 
  title = 'RUV (logcounts) vs Day treatment')
plot_UMAP(
  rna_metrics@UMAPs$fastRUVIII_supervised, 
  rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize, run_umap = F, 
  title = 'RUV (logcounts) vs libsize', label_is_continuous = T)

plot_UMAP(
  adt_metrics@UMAPs$fastRUVIII_supervised, 
  rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, 
  run_umap = F, title = 'RUV (ADT logcounts) vs Day treatment')

plot_UMAP(
  adt_metrics@UMAPs$fastRUVIII_supervised, 
  adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize, run_umap = F, 
  title = 'RUV (ADT logcounts) vs libsize', label_is_continuous = T)

#plot_UMAP(adt_metrics@UMAPs$CLR, rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, run_umap = F)
#plot_UMAP(adt_metrics@UMAPs$CLR, rna_metrics@Metadata$capture, run_umap = F)
plot_UMAP(
  adt_metrics@UMAPs$Raw_counts, rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, 
  run_umap = F, title = 'Raw ADT counts vs Day treatment')

plot_UMAP(
  adt_metrics@UMAPs$Raw_counts, 
  adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize, run_umap = F, 
  title = 'ADT raw counts vs libsize', label_is_continuous = T)

plot_UMAP(
  rna_metrics@UMAPs$Raw_counts, rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, 
  run_umap = F, title = 'Raw RNA counts vs Day treatment')

plot_UMAP(
  rna_metrics@UMAPs$Raw_counts, 
  rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize, run_umap = F, 
  title = 'Raw RNA counts vs libsize', label_is_continuous = T)

```


```{r}
test <- rna_metrics@Raw_data[,1:20000] %>% as.matrix() %>% t()
#heatmap(test[1:20,1:20], Rowv = NA)
#svd <- BiocSingular::runSVD(test, 20, center = F, BSPARAM = BiocSingular::bsparam())
#View(svd$u %*% diag(svd$d) %*% t(svd$v) %>% round(digits = 0))
#diag(x= svd$d[1:10])

test_metadata <- adt_metrics@Metadata[1:20000,]

# rownames(adt_metrics@Raw_data) %in% ncgs

test_nb <- ruvIIInb::fastruvIII.nb(
  t(test), M = ruv::replicate.matrix(test_metadata$Treatment), 
  ctl = colnames(test) %in% ncgs,
  k= 2)

test_fastruv <- Sparse_RUV_III(
  log2(test+1), 
  Yrep = log2(test+1), 
  M = ruv::replicate.matrix(test_metadata$Treatment), 
  ctl = colnames(test) %in% ncgs, 
  k = 2)

View(as.matrix(exp(assay(test_nb,'logPAC'))-1) %>% t())


```


# WNN on the RUV normalized data
```{r}

nk_data@reductions$fastRUVIII_rna_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = rna_metrics@PCs$fastRUVIII_supervised, key = 'fastRUVIIIrna_')
nk_data@reductions$fastRUVIII_adt_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = adt_metrics@PCs$fastRUVIII_supervised, key = 'fastRUVIIIadt_', assay = "ADT")

nk_data <- Seurat::FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  nk_data, 
  reduction.list = list("fastRUVIII_rna_pca", "fastRUVIII_adt_pca"),
  dims.list = list(1:30, 1:13))

nk_data <- RunUMAP(nk_data, nn.name = "weighted.nn", reduction.name = "wnn.umap", reduction.key = "wnnUMAP_")

```



```{r}
DimPlot(nk_data, reduction = "wnn.umap", group.by = "Day_Treatment")
DimPlot(nk_data, reduction = "wnn.umap", group.by = "Day")
DimPlot(nk_data, reduction = "wnn.umap", group.by = "Treatment")
DimPlot(nk_data, reduction = "wnn.umap", group.by = "genetic_donor")

plot_UMAP(
  nk_data@reductions$wnn.umap@cell.embeddings, nk_data$log2_rna_libsize, 
  run_umap = F, title = 'Treatment vs RNA libsize', 
  label_is_continuous = T, aspect_ratio = 0.6, alpha = 0.4)

plot_UMAP(
  nk_data@reductions$wnn.umap@cell.embeddings, nk_data$log2_adt_libsize, 
  run_umap = F, title = 'Treatment vs ADT libsize', 
  label_is_continuous = T, aspect_ratio = 0.6, alpha = 0.4)


VlnPlot(nk_data, features = "RNA.weight", group.by = 'Day_Treatment', sort = TRUE, pt.size = 0.01, alpha = 0.02 ) +
  NoLegend()
VlnPlot(nk_data, features = "ADT.weight", group.by = 'Day_Treatment', sort = TRUE, pt.size = 0.01, , alpha = 0.02 ) +
  NoLegend()


```


# Trajectory analysis with slingshot on single treatments
```{r}

cytokine_subset <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = CreateAssayObject(rna_metrics@Raw_data[,nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"], key = "rna_"), assay = "RNA")
cytokine_subset@assays$ADT <- CreateAssayObject(counts = adt_metrics@Raw_data[,nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"], key = "adt_")

cytokine_matrix <- rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[,rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Cytokine"]
pca <- run_PCA(cytokine_matrix, pcs = 30)

cytokine_subset@reductions$fastRUVIII_rna_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = pca$u, key = 'fastRUVIIIrna_')

cytokine_adt_matrix <- adt_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[,adt_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Cytokine"]
pca <- run_PCA(cytokine_adt_matrix, pcs = 13)
cytokine_subset@reductions$fastRUVIII_adt_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = pca$u, key = 'fastRUVIIIadt_', assay = "ADT")

cytokine_subset <- Seurat::FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  cytokine_subset, 
  reduction.list = list("fastRUVIII_rna_pca", "fastRUVIII_adt_pca"),
  dims.list = list(1:30, 1:13),)

cytokine_subset <- RunUMAP(
  cytokine_subset, nn.name = "weighted.nn", 
  reduction.name = "wnn.umap", 
  reduction.key = "wnnUMAP_", n.components = 3)

cytokine_subset <- Seurat::FindClusters(
  cytokine_subset, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, 
  resolution = 0.5, cluster.name = "wnn_clusters")


```

```{r}

cytokine_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(cytokine_subset)
reducedDims(cytokine_sce)$UMAP <- Embeddings(cytokine_subset, "wnn.umap")

reducedDims(cytokine_sce)$pca_adt_concat <- cbind(
  Embeddings(cytokine_subset, "fastRUVIII_rna_pca")[,1:20], 
  Embeddings(cytokine_subset, "fastRUVIII_adt_pca"))

cytokine_sce$clusters <- cytokine_subset$wnn_clusters

cytokine_sce <- slingshot::slingshot(
  cytokine_sce, clusterLabels = 'clusters', 
  reducedDim = 'WNN.UMAP', approx_points = 100)

```



```{r}
# Get cell UMAP coordinates
df <- as.data.frame(reducedDim(cytokine_sce, "WNN.UMAP"))
df$cluster <- cytokine_sce$wnn_clusters
df$Day <- nk_data$Day[nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"]
df$rna_libsize <- nk_data$log2_rna_libsize[nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"]
df$adt_libsize <- nk_data$log2_adt_libsize[nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"]
df$donor <- nk_data$genetic_donor[nk_data$Treatment == "Cytokine"]

# Start building plot
p <- plotly::plot_ly(
  data = df, 
  x = ~wnnUMAP_1, 
  y = ~wnnUMAP_2, 
  z = ~wnnUMAP_3,
  color = ~Day, 
  type = "scatter3d", 
  mode = "markers",
  marker = list(size = 1), 
  alpha = 0.8)

# Add slingshot curves
curves <- slingshot::slingCurves(cytokine_sce)
for (crv in curves) {
  crv_df <- as.data.frame(crv$s)[,1:3]  # Ensure only first 3 dimensions
  colnames(crv_df) <- c("x", "y", "z")
  
  p <- p %>% 
    plotly::add_paths(
      data = crv_df,
      x = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
      line = list(width = 4, color = "black"),
      inherit = FALSE,  # Don't inherit properties from main plot
      showlegend = FALSE
    )
}

p  # show plot


```


```{r}
# â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”
# Trajectory analysis with slingshot on Feeder treatment
# â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”â€”

# 1. Subset into Seurat object
feeder_subset <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = CreateAssayObject(
    rna_metrics@Raw_data[, nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"],
    key = "rna_"
  ),
  assay = "RNA"
)
feeder_subset@assays$ADT <- CreateAssayObject(
  counts = adt_metrics@Raw_data[, nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"],
  key = "adt_"
)

# 2. FastRUVIII PCA on RNA
feeder_matrix <- rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[, rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Feeder"]
pca_rna <- run_PCA(feeder_matrix, pcs = 30)
feeder_subset@reductions$fastRUVIII_rna_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = pca_rna$u,
  key = "fastRUVIIIrna_"
)

# 3. FastRUVIII PCA on ADT
feeder_adt_matrix <- adt_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[, adt_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Feeder"]
pca_adt <- run_PCA(feeder_adt_matrix, pcs = 13)
feeder_subset@reductions$fastRUVIII_adt_pca <- Seurat::CreateDimReducObject(
  embeddings = pca_adt$u,
  key = "fastRUVIIIadt_",
  assay = "ADT"
)

# 4. Build WNN graph + 3D UMAP
feeder_subset <- Seurat::FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  feeder_subset,
  reduction.list = list("fastRUVIII_rna_pca", "fastRUVIII_adt_pca"),
  dims.list      = list(1:30, 1:13)
)
feeder_subset <- RunUMAP(
  feeder_subset,
  nn.name        = "weighted.nn",
  reduction.name = "wnn.umap",
  reduction.key  = "wnnUMAP_",
  n.components   = 3
)
feeder_subset <- Seurat::FindClusters(
  feeder_subset,
  graph.name   = "wsnn",
  algorithm    = 3,
  resolution   = 0.5,
  cluster.name = "wnn_clusters"
)

# 5. Convert to SingleCellExperiment & run Slingshot
feeder_sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(feeder_subset)
reducedDims(feeder_sce)$UMAP <- Embeddings(feeder_subset, "wnn.umap")
reducedDims(feeder_sce)$pca_adt_concat <- cbind(
  Embeddings(feeder_subset, "fastRUVIII_rna_pca")[, 1:20],
  Embeddings(feeder_subset, "fastRUVIII_adt_pca")
)
feeder_sce$clusters <- feeder_subset$wnn_clusters

feeder_sce <- slingshot::slingshot(
  feeder_sce,
  clusterLabels  = "clusters",
  reducedDim     = "WNN.UMAP",    # matches your Seurat UMAP naming
  approx_points  = 100
)

```


```{r}

library(plotly)

# Assemble a dataframe
df_feeder <- as.data.frame(reducedDim(feeder_sce, "WNN.UMAP"))
df_feeder$cluster      <- feeder_sce$clusters
df_feeder$Day          <- nk_data$Day[nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"]
df_feeder$rna_libsize  <- nk_data$log2_rna_libsize[nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"]
df_feeder$adt_libsize  <- nk_data$log2_adt_libsize[nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"]
df_feeder$donor  <- nk_data$genetic_donor[nk_data$Treatment == "Feeder"]


# Base 3D scatter
p_feeder <- plot_ly(
  data = df_feeder,
  x    = ~wnnUMAP_1, y = ~wnnUMAP_2, z = ~wnnUMAP_3,
  color = ~donor,
  type  = "scatter3d",
  mode  = "markers",
  marker = list(size = 1),
  alpha  = 0.8
)

# Overlay Slingshot curves
feeder_curves <- slingshot::slingCurves(feeder_sce)
for (crv in feeder_curves) {
  crv_df <- as.data.frame(crv$s)[, 1:3]
  colnames(crv_df) <- c("x", "y", "z")
  p_feeder <- p_feeder %>%
    add_paths(
      data      = crv_df,
      x         = ~x, y = ~y, z = ~z,
      line      = list(width = 4, color = "black"),
      inherit   = FALSE,
      showlegend = FALSE
    )
}

p_feeder  # render the plot
```


```{r}

subset <- rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment %in% c("Day3_Cytokine", "Baseline_Baseline")

cytokine_day3_de <- wilcoxon_test(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[,subset],
  variable = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[subset],
  is.log = T)

cytokine_day3_de <- cytokine_day3_de[cytokine_day3_de$Adj.pvalue != 0.00,] 
cytokine_day3_de <- cytokine_day3_de[order(cytokine_day3_de$Adj.pvalue),] 

```


```{r}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(clusterProfiler)

hs <- org.Hs.eg.db
top_genes <- AnnotationDbi::select(hs, 
       keys = cytokine_day3_de$genes[1:100],
       columns = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL"),
       keytype = "SYMBOL")
#rm(hs)

plot_GO_enrichment(top_genes$ENTREZID, gene_id_type = 'ENTREZID', ontology = "BP")
plot_GO_enrichment(top_genes$ENTREZID, gene_id_type = 'ENTREZID', ontology = "CC")
plot_GO_enrichment(top_genes$ENTREZID, gene_id_type = 'ENTREZID', ontology = "MF")


```


```{r}

all_conds <- unique(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)
test_conds <- setdiff(all_conds, "Baseline_Baseline")
de_gene_list <- list()

# 2. loop over them
for(cond in test_conds) {
  message("Running DE for ", cond, " vs baselineâ€¦")
  
  # 2a. subset cells to this cond + baseline
  keep <- rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment %in% c(cond, "Baseline_Baseline")
  
  # 2b. run Wilcoxon
  de_res <- wilcoxon_test(
    rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[, keep],
    variable = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[keep],
    is.log = TRUE
  ) %>%
    filter(Adj.pvalue != 0) %>%
    arrange(Adj.pvalue)
  
  # 2c. take top 100 symbols
  top_syms <- head(de_res$genes, 100)
  
  # 2d. map to ENTREZ
  ann <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys     = top_syms,
    keytype  = "SYMBOL",
    columns  = c("ENTREZID","SYMBOL")
  )
  
  de_gene_list[[cond]] <- ann
}

```

```{r}
plots <- list()
for(list in names(de_gene_list)){
  for(ont in c("BP","CC","MF")) {
    plots[[paste0(list,"_",ont)]] <- plot_GO_enrichment(
      de_gene_list[[list]]$ENTREZID,
      gene_id_type = "ENTREZID",
      ontology = ont)
  }
}

```





# Trying DE analysis
```{r}
# pseudobulking
groups <- paste0(
  rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment,"-",
  #rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment,"-",
  rna_metrics@Metadata$capture,"-",
  rna_metrics@Metadata$genetic_donor)

pseudobulk_counts <- base::rowsum(t(as.matrix(rna_metrics@Raw_data)), group = groups) %>% t()

# remove very lowly expressed genes after pseudobulking
pseudobulk_counts <- pseudobulk_counts[(MatrixGenerics::rowMaxs(pseudobulk_counts) >= 5),]

sample_names <- colnames(pseudobulk_counts)
metadata <- tibble(
  sample = sample_names,
  day_treatment = str_split_fixed(sample_names, "-", 3)[, 1],
  #day = str_split_fixed(sample_names, "-", 4)[, 1],
  #treatment = str_split_fixed(sample_names, "-", 4)[, 2],
  capture = str_split_fixed(sample_names, "-", 3)[, 2],
  donor = str_split_fixed(sample_names, "-", 3)[, 3],
  libsize = log2(colSums(pseudobulk_counts))
)

# Create DGEList
dge <- DGEList(counts = pseudobulk_counts)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")

# Create design matrix (e.g., comparing treatment groups, adjusting for donor)
metadata$day_treatment <- factor(metadata$day_treatment)
#metadata$treatment <- factor(metadata$treatment)
metadata$donor <- factor(metadata$donor)
design <- model.matrix(~ donor + capture + day_treatment, data = metadata)


#  [1] "(Intercept)"                "donordonor_B"               "donordonor_C"               "donordonor_D"          
#  [5] "donordonor_E"               "donordonor_F"               "captureC105_S2"             "captureC105_S3"      
#  [9] "captureC105_S4"             "captureC105_S5"             "captureC105_S6"             "captureC105_S7"       
# [13] "day_treatmentDay3_Cytokine" "day_treatmentDay3_Feeder"   "day_treatmentDay6_Cytokine" "day_treatmentDay6_Feeder"  
# [17] "day_treatmentDay9_Cytokine" "day_treatmentDay9_Feeder"  


```


# edgeR
```{r}
library(edgeR)

# Estimate dispersion
dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design)

# Fit model and test
fit <- glmFit(dge, design)
lrt <- glmLRT(fit, coef = "day_treatmentDay9_Feeder")  # Replace with actual contrast

# Results
edgeR_res <- topTags(lrt, n = Inf)$table

```

# limma
```{r}
library(limma)

# Apply voom transformation
v <- voom(dge, design, plot = TRUE)  # Optional diagnostic plot
fit <- lmFit(v, design)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

# Results
limma_results <- topTable(fit, coef = "donordonor_F", number = Inf)

```
# RUVIII
```{r}

matrix <- as(log2(pseudobulk_counts + 1), "dgCMatrix")

de_ncg <- fastRUVIII::FindNCG(
  matrix, 
  metadata = metadata, 
  bio_variables = c("day_treatment","donor"),
  unwanted_variables = c("libsize", "capture"), 
  sample_fraction = 1,
  no.ncg = 300)

de_prps <- fastRUVIII::CreatePRPC(
  matrix, 
  metadata = metadata, 
  bio_vars = c("day_treatment"), 
  uv_vars = c("libsize", "capture"), 
  group_by_vars = c(NA, NA), 
  separate_bins_by_biology = c(T, NA), 
  sampling_amount = 1)

de_ruv <- fastRUVIII::fastRUVIII(
  matrix, 
  k = 1, 
  replicates = de_prps, 
  control_genes = rownames(matrix) %in% de_ncg, 
  apply_log = F
)

```

```{r}
# limma with RUV results
fit <- lmFit(t(de_ruv$newY), design)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

# Results
ruv_limma_results <- topTable(fit, coef = "donordonor_F", number = Inf)

```


# Plot results
```{r}

res <-limma_results  # or edgeR_res

# Add significance flags
res$significant <- res$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(res$logFC) > 1

ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)")


plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot")


```



```{r}

res <-ruv_limma_results  # or edgeR_res

# Add significance flags
res$significant <- res$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(res$logFC) > 1

ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)")


plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot")


```


```{r}

# Add significance flags
edgeR_res$significant <- edgeR_res$FDR < 0.05 & abs(edgeR_res$logFC) > 1

ggplot(edgeR_res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(PValue), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)")


limma::plotMA(edgeR_res, main = "MA Plot")

```

# using RUV W as a covariate
```{r}
metadata$W <- de_ruv$W[,1]
design <- model.matrix(~ donor + capture + day_treatment + W, data = metadata)

# Estimate dispersion
dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design)

# Fit model and test
fit <- glmFit(dge, design)
lrt <- glmLRT(fit, coef = "day_treatmentDay9_Feeder")  # Replace with actual contrast

# Results
edgeR_res <- topTags(lrt, n = Inf)$table


v <- voom(dge, design, plot = TRUE)  # Optional diagnostic plot
fit <- lmFit(v, design)
fit <- eBayes(fit)

# Results
limma_results <- topTable(fit, coef = "day_treatmentDay9_Feeder", number = Inf)

```

```{r}

res <-limma_results  # or edgeR_res

# Add significance flags
res$significant <- res$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(res$logFC) > 1

ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)")


plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot")


```



```{r}

# Add significance flags
edgeR_res$significant <- edgeR_res$FDR < 0.05 & abs(edgeR_res$logFC) > 1

ggplot(edgeR_res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(PValue), color = significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano plot", x = "log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(p-value)")


limma::plotMA(edgeR_res, main = "MA Plot")

```


```{r, fig.width= 10}

mean_control <- rowMeans(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"])
mean_treatment <- rowMeans(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data$fastRUVIII_supervised[de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment == "Day9_Cytokine"])

# Since it's in log2 scale, just subtract:
log2_fc <- mean_treatment - mean_control

plot_data <- data.frame(Gene = de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, log2FC = log2_fc)

ggplot(plot_data[1:50,], aes(x = Gene, y = log2FC, fill = log2FC > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Log2 Fold Change from Log-Normalized Data", y = "log2 Fold Change") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("red", "blue"), guide = "none") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```

```{r, fig.width= 10}
mean_control <- rowMeans(
  (rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, 
    rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"]))

mean_treatment <- rowMeans(
  (rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, 
    rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment == "Day9_Cytokine"]))

# Since it's in log2 scale, just subtract:
log2_fc <- mean_treatment - mean_control

plot_data <- data.frame(
  Gene = rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI)[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL
    ], 
  log2FC = log2_fc)

ggplot(plot_data[1:50,], aes(x = Gene, y = log2FC, fill = log2FC > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Log2 Fold Change from Log-Normalized Data", y = "log2 Fold Change") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("red", "blue"), guide = "none") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```

```{r, fig.width= 10}
mean_control <- rowMeans(
  (rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, 
    rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"]))

mean_treatment <- rowMeans(
  (rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL, 
    rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment == "Day9_Cytokine"]))

# Since it's in log2 scale, just subtract:
log2_fc <- mean_treatment - mean_control

plot_data <- data.frame(
  Gene = rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform)[
    rownames(rna_metrics@Adj_data$SCTransform) %in% 
      de_gene_list$Day9_Cytokine$SYMBOL
    ], 
  log2FC = log2_fc)

ggplot(plot_data[1:50,], aes(x = Gene, y = log2FC, fill = log2FC > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Log2 Fold Change from Log-Normalized Data", y = "log2 Fold Change") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("red", "blue"), guide = "none") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```


```{r}
# Define marker pairs
markers <- DataFrame(
  RNA = c("IL2RA", "CD69", "TFRC"),
  ADT = c("CD25", "CD69", "CD71")

)

# RNA only: 'IFNG', 'TNF', 'XCL1', 'XCL2', 'FGFBP2', ADT only: "CD226-DNAM-1"

method1 <- "totalVI"
method2 <- "totalVI"
marker <- 3

spearman <- cor(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data[[method1]][markers$RNA[marker],], 
  adt_metrics@Adj_data[[method2]][markers$ADT[marker],], 
  method = "spearman")
pearson  <- cor(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data[[method1]][markers$RNA[marker],], 
  adt_metrics@Adj_data[[method2]][markers$ADT[marker],], 
  method = "pearson")

spearman_ls <- cor(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data[[method1]][markers$RNA[marker],], 
  rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize, 
  method = "spearman")
spearman_ls2 <- cor(
  adt_metrics@Adj_data[[method2]][markers$ADT[marker],], 
  adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize, 
  method = "spearman")

print(paste0("Correlations for ", method1, " and ",method2," for ",markers$RNA[marker], " and ", markers$ADT[marker]))
print(paste0("Spearman: ", spearman))
print(paste0("Pearson: ", pearson))
print(paste0("Spearman RNA libsize: ", spearman_ls))
print(paste0("Spearman ADT libsize: ", spearman_ls2))

```


```{r}
#df$cell <- factor(df$cell, levels = df$cell)

# 1. Define your samples in the order you want (e.g. day3 first, then day6)
#sample <- colnames(sce)[ order(colData(sce)$condition) ]

# 2. Choose the gene you want to plot
gene   <- "TFRC"
order1 <- rna_metrics@Adj_data[[method1]][gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)] %>% log2()
#order1 <- rna_metrics@Raw_data[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)] %>% log2()
#order1 <- test$W[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order1,
    x     = 1:length(order1),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```

```{r}
#df$cell <- factor(df$cell, levels = df$cell)

# 1. Define your samples in the order you want (e.g. day3 first, then day6)
#sample <- colnames(sce)[ order(colData(sce)$condition) ]

# 2. Choose the gene you want to plot
gene   <- "TFRC"
order1 <- rna_metrics@Adj_data[[method1]][gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)] %>% log2()
#order1 <- rna_metrics@Raw_data[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)] %>% log2()
#order1 <- test$W[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order1,
    x     = 1:length(order1),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )


```


```{r}
#df$cell <- factor(df$cell, levels = df$cell)

# 1. Define your samples in the order you want (e.g. day3 first, then day6)
#sample <- colnames(sce)[ order(colData(sce)$condition) ]

# 2. Choose the gene you want to plot
gene   <- "CD71"
order2 <- adt_metrics@Adj_data[[method2]][gene, order(adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order2,
    x     = 1:length(order2),
    color = adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize[order(adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )


```

```{r}
order2 <- adt_metrics@Adj_data[[method2]][gene, order(adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order2,
    x     = 1:length(order2),
    color = adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[order(adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )


```


```{r}
ctl_ls <- colSums(rna_metrics@Raw_data[ncgs,]) %>% log2()
plot_boxplot_categorical(ctl_ls, rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, c("Ctl Libsize (log2)", "Day Treatment"))


```

# Running RUV separately per biology
```{r}

normalize_by_group <- function(
    mat, 
    group_lab, 
    bio_vars, 
    uv_vars, 
    metadata, 
    group_by_vars,
    separate_bins_by_biology,
    k, 
    apply_log=TRUE) {
  # record original cell order
  orig_cells <- colnames(mat)

  # split cell names by group
  cells_by_group <- split(orig_cells, group_lab)

  # for each group, subset and normalise
  norm_list <- lapply(names(cells_by_group), function(group) {
    cells <- cells_by_group[[group]]
    #print(cells)
    sub_mat <- mat[, cells]
    sub_metadata <- metadata[cells,]
    message(paste0("Creating PRPC for ", group, " (",length(cells), " cells)"))
    sub_reps <- CreatePRPC(
      sub_mat, 
      uv_vars = uv_vars, 
      metadata = sub_metadata, 
      bio_vars = bio_vars, 
      group_by_vars = group_by_vars, 
      separate_bins_by_biology = separate_bins_by_biology
      )
    message("Finding NCGs")
    sub_ncgs <- fastRUVIII::FindNCG(
      sub_mat, unwanted_variables = uv_vars, 
      bio_variables = bio_vars, 
      no.ncg = 0.1*nrow(sub_mat),
      metadata = sub_metadata, 
      apply_log = apply_log, 
      sample_fraction = 0.5
      )
    message("Starting RUVIII with K = ", k)
    res <- fastRUVIII::fastRUVIII(
      object        = as(sub_mat, "dgCMatrix"),
      k             = k,
      replicates    = sub_reps,
      control_genes = sub_ncgs,
      apply_log     = apply_log
    )
    # extract the corrected Y (cells Ă— genes) and transpose back to genes Ă— cells
    t(res$newY)
  })

  # bind back into one big genes Ă— cells matrix
  combined <- do.call(cbind, norm_list)

  # reorder columns to exactly the original cell order
  combined <- combined[, orig_cells, drop=FALSE]

  return(combined)
}


```


```{r}

ruv_split <- normalize_by_group(
  rna_metrics@Raw_data,
  group_lab = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, 
  bio_vars = c("genetic_donor"), 
  uv_vars = c("log2_rna_libsize", "capture"), 
  metadata = rna_metrics@Metadata, group_by_vars = c("genetic_donor", NA), 
  separate_bins_by_biology = c(TRUE, NA), 
  k = 1, 
  apply_log = TRUE)

ruv_split_adt <- normalize_by_group(
  adt_metrics@Raw_data,
  group_lab = adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment, 
  bio_vars = c("genetic_donor"), 
  uv_vars = c("log2_rna_libsize", "capture"), 
  metadata = adt_metrics@Metadata, group_by_vars = c("genetic_donor", NA), 
  separate_bins_by_biology = c(TRUE, NA), 
  k = 2, 
  apply_log = TRUE)

```


```{r}
gene <- "TFRC"
order3 <- ruv_split[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order3,
    x     = 1:length(order3),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ggtitle("IL2RA expression ordered by libsize")

```

```{r}

gene   <- "TFRC"
order5 <- ruv_split[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order5,
    x     = 1:length(order5),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ggtitle("IL2RA expression ordered by group")

```


```{r}

gene   <- "IL2RA"
order5 <- log2(rna_metrics@Raw_data[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]+1)

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order5,
    x     = 1:length(order5),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```

```{r}
gene <- "IL2RA"
order3 <- log2(rna_metrics@Raw_data[gene, order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]+ 1)

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order3,
    x     = 1:length(order3),
    color = rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize[order(rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )

```

```{r}

gene   <- "CD71"
order2 <- ruv_split_adt[gene, order(adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize)]

ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order2,
    x     = 1:length(order2),
    color = adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize[order(adt_metrics@Metadata$log2_adt_libsize)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )


```

```{r}
order2 <- ruv_split_adt[gene, order(adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    y     = order2,
    x     = 1:length(order2),
    color = adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment[order(adt_metrics@Metadata$Day_Treatment)]
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x     = "Cells",
    y     = paste0(gene, " expression"),
    color = "Condition"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.border    = element_rect(colour = "grey60", fill = NA, size = 1.5),
    aspect.ratio    = 1/2,
    legend.position = "none"
  )


```

```{r}

hist(ruv_split["IL2RA",], main = "RUV Split")
hist(log2(1+rna_metrics@Raw_data["IL2RA",]), main = "Raw counts log2 +1")
hist(log2(rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI["IL2RA",]), main = "totalVI")
plot(
  rna_metrics@Metadata$log2_rna_libsize[rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"], 
  log2(rna_metrics@Raw_data["IL2RA",rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"]+1))

plot(
  ruv_split["IL2RA",rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"], 
  log2(rna_metrics@Raw_data["IL2RA",rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"]+1))

plot(
  rna_metrics@Adj_data$totalVI["IL2RA",rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"], 
  log2(rna_metrics@Raw_data["IL2RA",rna_metrics@Metadata$Treatment == "Baseline"]+1))

```



```{r}
# out_data <- list(
#   fastRUVIII_rna = rna_metrics,
#   fastRUVIII_adt = adt_metrics,
#   cytokine_sce = cytokine_sce,
#   feeder_sce = feeder_sce,
#   de_gene_list = de_gene_list,
#   ruv_split = ruv_split,
#   ruv_split_adt = ruv_split_adt)
# 
# saveRDS(out_data, file = "/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/nk_backup_objects.rds")

# save.image(file= '/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/nk_backup.RData')
# load('/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/nk_backup.RData')

# try QS for quicker reading

data <- readRDS("/vast/scratch/users/liu.ne/nk_backup_objects.rds")
rna_metrics <- data$fastRUVIII_rna
adt_metrics <- data$fastRUVIII_adt
feeder_sce <- data[[4]]
cytokine_sce <- data[[3]]
de_gene_list <- data$de_gene_list
ruv_split <- data$ruv_split
ruv_split_adt <- data$ruv_split_adt

```
